ratings.comment: Jonathan was very engaging and his assignments were always clear and fun! He mentioned assigning more work than other english 100 professors but I thought the workload was very appropriate, especially with his scheduling and overall organization of the class.

In the first lecture he mentioned he gives out more work than most Eng professors, but getting assignments done each week was not hard! There were no exams but attendance was pretty strictly mandatory. It was great being in a small class where Jonathan truly wanted to get to know each student, and each paper was interesting and allowed creativity.
He was really engaging with the students. He made all of his lectures really fun.

Jonathan is by far the most engaging professor I had in my first semester and was absolutely amazing. He related his assignments to concepts students could apply in any field occupationally. There are workshops to help peer review but it was super helpful and everyone is super nice (his icebreakers genuinely really helped us get to know each other)

I took Professor Jibson's English 100 this semester and it was amazing. He may scare you at the beginning by mentioning that his class will be more work that the other English 100 professors but it's worth it. There are no exams in this class, just a lot of papers. 10/10 would recommend.
